children.name: Open Jobs page loads with requisitions
Import CSV and New requisition buttons present
Stats cards visible — Active reqs, Avg time-to-fill, Pipeline value
Shows correct requisition count on page
Active reqs stat card shows correct count
02-B Chat input and Send button visible
05-B After clear, new query works normally
06-A Sending query adds it to history panel
06-B History shows result count and timestamp
06-C Clear history button clears all entries
07-E Active AI Recruiter nav item is highlighted
08-D Keyword fallback works when AI is out-of-credit
All filter dropdowns present on page
Export Bulk import and Ask agent buttons present
Search by name — Padma — returns results
Search by skill — Java — returns results
Search by company — Publicis Sapient — returns results
Search nonsense — abc123xyz — returns no results
Search partial name — Pad — returns results
Search case insensitive — PADMA vs padma same results
Search single character — P — returns results
Location filter — select a state and results update
Source filter — select Ceipal and results update
Combined search and filter — Padma + Ceipal
Reset all filters — results return to default
View button opens candidate profile page
Back navigation returns to candidates list
Bulk import button opens import interface
Ask agent navigates to AI Recruiter chat
Sort control is present and functional
Default shows All sources with total count
Job card shows title and company location
Job card shows Candidates and Applications count
Job card shows Top match percentage
View matches button present on job cards
Source button present on job cards
Active and closed status badges visible
Status dropdown present to change job status
View matches button navigates to candidate matches
Import CSV button opens import interface
New requisition button navigates to form
New requisition form shows JD text area
New requisition form shows Parse with Claude button
New requisition form accepts JD text input
Cancel button returns to jobs list
DEFERRED — Parse JD with Claude extracts fields correctly
DEFERRED — New requisition created and shows as active
DEFERRED — Position filled — change status from active to closed
